ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Of Filing Of Petition For Final Distribution Or Petition For Approval Of Report On Status Of Administration.
Off Calendar Mar-23-2015 Continued To Apr-27-15 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Robert Roddick for (executor) Richard Stacks.

Mr. Roddick reported that he received a call from Mr. Stacks on Friday, that Mr. Stacks has signed a waiver of accounting and sent it via email and will send the original and requested a 30 day continuance. The status of filing a petition for final distribution or petition for approval of report on status of administration was continued to April 27, 2015 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Andrew Y.S. Cheng. Clerk: Leslie Gomez. Bailiff: Deputy Allen. (Not Reported)

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Of Filing Of Petition For Final Distribution Or Petition For Approval Of Report On Status Of Administration.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Of Filing Of Petition For Final Distribution Or Petition For Approval Of Report On Status Of Administration.
Off Calendar Feb-09-2015 Continued To Feb-23-15 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Of Filing Of Petition For Final Distribution Or Petition For Approval Of Report On Status Of Administration.
Off Calendar Oct-06-2014 Continued To Feb-09-15 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Robert Roddick for (executor) Richard Stacks.

The court stated that the order to appear addressed to Mr. Stacks was returned to the court. Mr. Roddick reported that Mr. Stacks is in Germany, that he has confirmation of receipt of mail via DHL and that he has not had verbal contact with Mr. Stacks in over a year. Mr. Roddick also stated that Mr. Stacks is the only heir, that he has verified the funds are still in the account, that he needs signatures for documents to complete the final accounting and requests a six month continuance. The status of filing petition for final distribution was continued to February 9, 2015 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. The order to appear is taken off calendar.

Judge: Paul H. Alavarado. Clerk: Leslie Gomez. Bailiff: Deputy Choi. (Not Reported)

ORDER OF STATUS HEARING
Off Calendar Oct-06-2014 Off Calendar

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Of Filing Of Petition For Final Distribution Or Petition For Approval Of Report On Status Of Administration.
Off Calendar Sep-10-2014 Continued To Oct-06-14 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

An Order to Appear will be issued to the Executor Richard Stacks and the Attorney Robert Roddick to appear on October 6, 2014 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 to explain why the petition for final distribution or petition for approval of status of administration have not been filed. The status hearing is also continued to that date.

Judge: Andrew Y.S. Cheng. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy R. McConico. (Not Reported)

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Be Relieved As Counsel
Off Calendar Aug-15-2013 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Robert Roddick for Richard Stacks.

The Court stated that there should have been more effort made in locating Mr. Stacks. Mr. Roddick stated that there are no other relatives, that he was not concerned until they attempted to muster the estate and do the inventory which is when Mr. Stacks stopped communicating and that he became aware that Mr. Stacks was in Hungary by way of the eviction matter. Mr. Roddick also stated that he called numerous phone numbers, that no one had heard of Mr. Stacks, that Mr. Stacks is a United States citizen and that the name Matthew Adams on the declaration was an error. The Motion to Be Relieved as Counsel was taken under submission.

Judge: John Dearman. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy T. Bradley. (Not Reported)

On 8/13/13, Attorney Robert Roddick phoned the Court requesting that his Motion to Be Relieved as Counsel be taken off calendar. On 8/15/13 Judge Dearman granted Mr. Roddick's request. Clerk: J. Alameda
